dct_title_s:
Le Cap de Bonne Esperance. Suivant les Nouvelles Obſervations de Messrs. de
          l'Academie Royale des Sciences
dct_alternative_sm:
Cape of Good Hope according to the observations made by the Royal Academy of
          Science
dct_description_sm:
Cartouche is "on a stone pediment surmounted by a lion and lioness, with a view of Table
        Bay in the background and the Governor's garden and homestead." Map includes a note
        describing the Cape of Good Hope and a legend explaining the contents of the
        mainland.
dct_spatial_sm: Good Hope, Cape of (South Africa : Cape)
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
